description:
The library `org.apache.maven:maven-core` version `3.6.3` was detected in `Maven library manager` located at `/u01/package/apache-maven-3.6.3/lib/maven-core-3.6.3.jar` and is vulnerable to `CVE-2021-26291`, which exists in versions `< 3.8.1`.

The vulnerability was found in the [Github Security Advisory](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2f88-5hg8-9x2x) with vendor severity: `Critical` ([NVD](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2021-26291) severity: `Critical`).

This vulnerability has a known exploit available. Source: [VulnCheck](https://www.whitesourcesoftware.com/resources/blog/maven-security-vulnerability-cve-2021-26291/).

The vulnerability can be remediated by updating the library to version `3.8.1` or higher, using `mvn versions:use-latest-releases -Dincludes=org.apache.maven:maven-core`.
